differential_diagnoses: DRESS syndrome (Drug Reaction with Eosinophilia and Systemic Symptoms)
Metastatic lung carcinoma with paraneoplastic dermatitis
next_steps: Perform peripheral blood flow cytometry for T-cell markers (CD3, CD4, CD8, CD7, CD26) to assess for circulating Sézary cells
Obtain T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies from both skin and peripheral blood
Perform image-guided core needle biopsy of the pulmonary mass and/or excisional biopsy of a representative lymph node
Repeat skin biopsy with immunohistochemical stains (CD3, CD4, CD8, CD20, CD30, Ki-67) and correlation with pathology
Perform a PET/CT scan to assess systemic metabolic activity and guide biopsy sites
Continue local wound care and monitor for secondary bacterial or viral superinfection
